top_signals.title: Stocks Slip as US-Iran Deadlock Rolls On: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A retreat in technology shares pulled stocks lower in the US and Asia. Oil fell modestly and Treasuries slipped as traders waited for signs of progress toward a peace deal in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says he's postponing 'scheduled attack of Iran tomorrow' at Middle East leaders' request
top_signals.summary: The U.S. and Iran are in a stalemate centered on the Strait of Hormuz, the global oil pathway whose closure due to the war has caused an energy supply shock.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The high cost of Donald Trump’s crony diplomacy
top_signals.summary: Together, Kushner and Witkoff have spearheaded negotiations on Ukraine, Gaza and Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Thailand Rolls Back Welcome Mat for Most Foreign Tourists
top_signals.summary: Thailand is rolling back some of its tourism friendly visa policies as the government seeks to crack down on crime and illegal employment involving foreign nationals, risking another setback for an industry that remains central to the economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ASEAN unity and Japan’s role amid U.S.-China tensions
top_signals.summary: Japan needs to recognize its role in strengthening ASEAN's autonomy as part of its own economic strategy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Polish officials vent worries over scrapped US troop deployment
top_signals.summary: “More than fifty billion dollars is the sum of the purchases that we are implementing in the United States,” Poland's defense minister noted.
